function e(e,t){(t==null||t>e.length)&&(t=e.length);for(var n=0,r=Array(t);n<t;n++)r[n]=e[n];return r}function t(e){if(Array.isArray(e))return e}function n(e,t){var n=e==null?null:typeof Symbol<`u`&&e[Symbol.iterator]||e[`@@iterator`];if(n!=null){var r=[],i=!0,a=!1,o,s;try{for(n=n.call(e);!(i=(o=n.next()).done)&&(r.push(o.value),!(t&&r.length===t));i=!0);}catch(e){a=!0,s=e}finally{try{!i&&n.return!=null&&n.return()}finally{if(a)throw s}}return r}}function r(){throw TypeError(`Invalid attempt to destructure non-iterable instance.\\nIn order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method.`)}function i(e,i){return t(e)||n(e,i)||o(e,i)||r()}function a(e){"@swc/helpers - typeof";return e&&typeof Symbol<`u`&&e.constructor===Symbol?`symbol`:typeof e}function o(t,n){if(t){if(typeof t==`string`)return e(t,n);var r=Object.prototype.toString.call(t).slice(8,-1);if(r===`Object`&&t.constructor&&(r=t.constructor.name),r===`Map`||r===`Set`)return Array.from(r);if(r===`Arguments`||/^(?:Ui|I)nt(?:8|16|32)(?:Clamped)?Array$/.test(r))return e(t,n)}}var s=function(e){return E(){var e=i([...arguments],4),t=e[0],n=e[1],r=e[2],a=r===void 0?window:r,o=e[3];w+=1;var s=w.toString();return a.addEventListener(t,n,o),T[s]={listenerId:s,eventType:t,context:a,callback:n,options:o},s}function D(e,t){if((e===void 0?`undefined`:a(e))==`object`)e.forEach(function(e){return D(e)});else{var n=e.toString();if(T[n]){var r=T[n],i=r.context,o=r.eventType,s=r.callback,c=r.options;i.removeEventListener(o,s,c),delete T[n]}else Object.keys(T).filter(function(e){var r=T[e];return r.eventType===n&&(!t||r.callback===t)}).forEach(function(e){return D(e)})}}function O(){Object.keys(T).forEach(function(e){return D(e)})}function k(){var e=i([...arguments],4),t=e[0],n=e[1],r=e[2],a=r===void 0?window:r,o=e[3],s=E(t,function(){var e=[...arguments];n.apply(a,e),D(s)},a,o);return s}function A(e){var t=[],n=function(e,n){return function(){var r=[...arguments];t.forEach(function(e){return D(e)}),e.apply(n,r)}};return e.forEach(function(e){var r=i(e,4),a=r[0],o=r[1],s=r[2],c=s===void //# sourceMappingURL=chunk-C65VWZLV-1bJzG5ow.js.map
